title: Master's Program in Media and Cultural Studies Application and Fees
content:
Master's Program in Media and Cultural Studies Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall Semester Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Pazar

The Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: VERBAL

FOR THE MASTER'S PROGRAM IN MEDIA AND CULTURAL STUDIES THESIS/NOTHESIS WILL NOT BE TAKE A SCIENCE EXAM AT THE ACCEPTANCE OF 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER STUDENTS.
